items.title: The accidental shared-state bug at scale
items.context: A dashboard rendered dozens of widgets, each initialized from a shared default settings object.
items.problem: Editing one widget's settings changed every widget, because all widgets referenced the same default object.
items.solution: Clone the defaults per widget using structuredClone(defaults) so each gets its own reference.
items.outcome: Widgets became independent and a class of hard-to-reproduce bugs disappeared.
